query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.sentiment_analyses (
  id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
  text TEXT NOT NULL,
  sentiment VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'neutral',
  score DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  confidence DECIMAL(5,4) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  emotions JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  keywords TEXT[] NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  language VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'en',
  source VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'manual',
  platform VARCHAR(50),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sentiment_analyses_user_id ON public.sentiment_analyses(user_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sentiment_analyses_created_at ON public.sentiment_analyses(created_at DESC);
